title: Past Events & Tech Challenges
text:
Beneficial Uses of Dredged Material
Deadline— August 24, 2023 (Closed)
ERDC seeks to advance the Beneficial Uses of Dredged Sediment (BUDM) with new techniques and technologies that reduce costs, lessen environmental impacts of dredging, and decrease direct and strategic placement of dredged sediment.
Read MoreBeneficial Uses of Dredged Material
Prototype Systems Development and Fabrication
Deadline— July 24, 2023 (Closed)
ERDC invites solutions that will develop lightweight-kitted solutions to provide rapidly deployable protection. This includes the advancement of new prototype systems, such as personnel bunkers, as well as further development of existing ERDC prototypes.
Read MorePrototype Systems Development and Fabrication
Anti-Terrorism/Force Protection Decision Support Tools
Deadline— July 3, 2023 (Closed)
ERDC seeks solutions to advance state-of-the-art handbooks, develop force protection planning publications and intuitive protection decision support tools, support demonstration of the developed tools, and conduct protection assessments of USACE facilities.
Read MoreAnti-Terrorism/Force Protection Decision Support Tools
Extreme Environmental Conditions Simulation
Deadline— July 10, 2023 (Closed)
ERDC is interested in walk-in solutions that can generate severe environmental conditions for testing purposes.
Read MoreExtreme Environmental Conditions Simulation
Innovate! Partnering to Advance Civil Works R&D
Deadline— May 23, 2023 (Closed)
This virtual event will be held Tuesday, May 23, 2023, from 2:00 to 3:30 pm CST to introduce significant new opportunities to collaborate with ERDC in the development and advancement of Civil Works solutions.
Read MoreInnovate! Partnering to Advance Civil Works R&D
Civil Works R&D Collider
Deadline— June 26, 2023 (Closed)
ERDC is interested in solutions that address identified needs in the civil works arena. This multi-phased tech challenge is a competitive opportunity to present new, novel, or provocative solutions.
Read MoreCivil Works R&D Collider
Frost Effects Research Facility Upgrade
Deadline— June 15, 2023 (Closed)
ERDC invites solutions that will enhance its Frost Effects Research Facility cooling reliability and efficiency.
Read MoreFrost Effects Research Facility Upgrade
Lane Proofing Assets for the Bradley Fighting Vehicle
Deadline— April 27, 2023 (Closed)
The U.S. Army ERDC seeks a prototype to support research efforts that lead to the development of requirements for a Bradley Fighting Vehicle lane proofing concept.
Read MoreLane Proofing Assets for the Bradley Fighting Vehicle
Innovation 2 Market 2023
Deadline— May 2, 2023 (Closed)
The Innovation 2 Market patent showcase will be held on May 3 at ERDCWERX for businesses and investors to learn about featured technologies developed by ERDC.
Read MoreInnovation 2 Market 2023
“All Things Small Business” Workshop
Deadline— March 28, 2023 (Closed)
ERDC, in coordination with ERDCWERX, is hosting a small business workshop that will feature informational briefings to assist small businesses when pursing government contract opportunities.
Read More“All Things Small Business” Workshop
Emergency and Operational Support CSO
Deadline— Open through November 7, 2023
ERDC's Construction Engineering Research Laboratory is seeking solutions to develop, improve, and deliver operational energy capabilities in support of both military and civilian mission sets of the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers.
Read MoreEmergency and Operational Support CSO
Installations of the Future CSO
Deadline— August 3, 2023 (Closed)
ERDC invites innovative commercial solutions in five areas of interest including data ingestion and management, smart installation, master planning modernization, and more.
Read MoreInstallations of the Future CSO
WERXMASH
Deadline— October 24, 2022 (Closed)
During this hybrid event, 26 DEFENSEWERX government partners and innovation hub representatives participated. 82 shared needs/challenges were identified and prioritized during facilitated discussions.
Read MoreWERXMASH
Warfighter Engineering CSO
Deadline— July 31, 2023 (Closed)
ERDC invites innovative commercial solutions that address additive construction and robotics in two areas of interest.
Read MoreWarfighter Engineering CSO
Augmented Reality/Virtual Reality (AR/VR) Technology in Flood Risk Management Applications
Deadline— September 8, 2022 (Closed)
The U.S. Army ERDC seeks to identify the latest Augmented Reality and Virtual Reality (AR/VR) solutions that could support planning, operations, and maintenance of flood risk management by the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers.
Read MoreAugmented Reality/Virtual Reality (AR/VR) Technology in Flood Risk Management Applications
